meta.description: Feno Yardeni Bond PER to S&P 500 Fair Value
meta.calculation_source: FRED series/observations API corporate bond yields plus 100x benchmark S&P 500 price/EPS; benchmark EPS/SPX currently comes from the existing Bloomberg-sourced benchmarks pipeline; pre-benchmark history preserved from verified seed.

bond_yield_input.label: Moody's Seasoned Aaa Corporate Bond Yield
Moody's Seasoned Baa Corporate Bond Yield

formulas.bond_per: 100 / average(Aaa corporate yield, Baa corporate yield)

columns.fair_value: Estimated fair value = EPS x bond_per
